content: The fragmented, incomplete search findings for the generic 'agent' Topic B act as an intrinsic exploration trigger for a 2025 ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agent, where the agent's innate reward signal from resolving prediction error drives it to fill in the missing knowledge gaps instead of relying on pre-specified external task rewards. This turns the incomplete state of the Topic B dataset itself into a test bed that can refine state-of-the-art active memory mechanisms for next-generation curious agents.
